name: com.gamesurf.npc-kit
description: Local LLM-powered NPC dialogue system with fine-tuned LoRA personality adapters, persistent memory via Supabase, and runtime model hot-swapping. Train custom NPC characters on your own knowledge sources and deploy them in Unity with no cloud API dependency.

samples.description: Minimal NPC dialogue setup with a single NPC and basic UI
Demonstrates cross-session memory persistence with Supabase
